message:
fix(engine): update hostcall_batch_transport tests for 4-arg submit_batch API

Fix pre-existing compile errors in hostcall_batch_transport_integration.rs
where submit_batch was called with 3 args instead of the current 4-arg
signature (added session_key parameter). Also clean up the enrichment
test file for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
